title: Team size vs Seats

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone!
I found some analytics in the developer account. Please help me understand the difference between team size and seats. I didn’t find any infromation in the documentation on that.

image1364×577 78.3 KB

Thank you for the help in advance!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Iryna_Belaya,

Team size is the team size the account’s first user filled in the signup survey
(it is an estimation for the number of seats in case the account is not paying)

Seats = paid seats

I hope that helps!

Cheers,
Matias
